hyperedges.label: Android SSE Resilience: backoff, Last-Event-ID, NetworkMonitor, lifecycle
Global Approval System: spec + plan + backend fix
SubAgent Chat Reuse: parameterized ChatScreen + Route.AgentChat + SessionPanel slim
SubAgent Bidirectional Communication: ask_parent + reply_to_agent + WAITING status

Android Critical Bug Fixes: delta race, scroll oscillation, IoDispatcher, AgentRepository

LLMProvider
nodes.description: Abstract base class with stream() method; adapters for Anthropic SDK and OpenAI-compatible endpoints

nodes.label: LLMProviderRegistry
nodes.description: Loads LLM providers from SQLite DB; supports get_default_with_model()

nodes.label: LLMProviderRecord
nodes.description: SQLite model: id, name, provider_type, base_url, api_key, model, thinking_format, is_default

nodes.label: AgentLoop
nodes.description: Async generator yielding LLMStreamEvent types; core LLM interaction loop

nodes.label: LLMStreamEvent
nodes.description: Union type in sebastian/core/stream_events.py: ThinkingBlockStart/Delta/Stop, TextBlockStart/Delta/Stop, ToolCallBlockStart, ToolCallReady, ToolResult, TurnDone

nodes.label: BaseAgent
nodes.description: Coordination layer; holds AgentLoop, EventBus, SessionStore, CapabilityRegistry; handles run_streaming(), cancel_session(), build_system_prompt()

nodes.label: SSE Events Protocol
nodes.description: Block-level events with block_id format b{iteration}_{index}; 500-event sliding buffer; Last-Event-ID reconnect

nodes.label: block_id format
nodes.description: Format: b{iteration}_{index} — encodes agent loop iteration and block position

nodes.label: A2A Protocol (deprecated)
nodes.description: Initially queue+future based; deprecated in favor of direct asyncio.create_task calls

nodes.label: PolicyGate
nodes.description: Wraps CapabilityRegistry; enforces permission tiers for tool execution

nodes.label: PermissionTier
nodes.description: Enum: LOW (direct), MODEL_DECIDES (PermissionReviewer LLM check), HIGH_RISK (mandatory approval)

nodes.label: PermissionReviewer
nodes.description: Stateless LLM call; returns ReviewDecision(proceed|escalate, explanation); lazy-holds llm_registry

nodes.label: ReviewDecision
nodes.description: Output of PermissionReviewer: proceed|escalate and explanation string

nodes.label: Session Model
nodes.description: Sessions with depth, parent_session_id, last_activity_at, goal; statuses: active/idle/completed/failed/stalled/waiting/cancelled

nodes.label: SessionStatus
nodes.description: active/idle/completed/failed/stalled/waiting/cancelled; WAITING added for sub-agent pause

nodes.label: Sub-Agent Auto-Registration
nodes.description: manifest.toml in agents/<name>/ directories; scanned at startup for automatic registration

nodes.label: Skills System
nodes.description: SKILL.md frontmatter format; registered as tools dynamically; loaded from skills/ directory

nodes.label: ThreePaneScaffold (Android)
nodes.description: androidx.compose.material3.adaptive; listPane=SessionPanel, detailPane=ChatContent, extraPane=TodoPanel

nodes.label: ChatViewModel
nodes.description: Android ViewModel; SSE state machine; manages ChatUiState including activeSessionId; switchSession(), sendMessage()

nodes.label: ChatUiState
nodes.description: Android data class: messages, composerState, scrollFollowState, agentAnimState, activeThinkingEffort, activeSessionId, isOffline, pendingApprovals, error

nodes.label: CompletionNotifier
nodes.description: Subscribes to SESSION_COMPLETED/FAILED/WAITING events; per-parent-session queue for serialization; triggers parent agent's new LLM turn

nodes.label: Todo Sidebar
nodes.description: Right-side sidebar; todo_write tool with overwrite semantics; TodoStore at sessions/<agent_type>/<session_id>/todos.json

nodes.label: TodoStore
nodes.description: Stores TodoItem list at sessions/<agent_type>/<session_id>/todos.json

nodes.label: TodoItem
nodes.description: Fields: content, activeForm, status

nodes.label: todo_write tool
nodes.description: Overwrites entire todo list; triggers todo_updated SSE event

nodes.label: todo_updated SSE event
nodes.description: Emitted when todo list changes; carried over SSE stream

nodes.label: Three-Tier Agent Architecture
nodes.description: Sebastian (depth=1) → Agent Leaders/dept heads (depth=2) → Agent Workers/members (depth=3); castle metaphor

nodes.label: delegate_to_agent tool
nodes.description: Creates depth=2 session + asyncio.create_task (no await); fires and forgets

nodes.label: spawn_sub_agent tool
nodes.description: Creates depth=3 session; checks max_children limit

nodes.label: check_sub_agents tool
nodes.description: Visibility tool to check status of sub-agents

nodes.label: inspect_session tool
nodes.description: Visibility tool to inspect session details

nodes.label: Stalled Detection
nodes.description: Watchdog every minute; threshold configurable in manifest; sets session to STALLED status

nodes.label: Core Tools
nodes.description: Six tools: Read (LOW), Write (MODEL_DECIDES), Edit (MODEL_DECIDES), Bash (MODEL_DECIDES), Glob (LOW), Grep (LOW)

nodes.label: Read Tool
nodes.description: PermissionTier.LOW; reads file content

nodes.label: Write Tool
nodes.description: PermissionTier.MODEL_DECIDES; mtime validation via _file_state.py; 3 cases: new file, never read, changed since read

nodes.label: Edit Tool
nodes.description: PermissionTier.MODEL_DECIDES; unique match enforcement; replace_all parameter

nodes.label: Bash Tool
nodes.description: PermissionTier.MODEL_DECIDES; asyncio.create_subprocess_shell; 600s default timeout; 10000 char truncation

nodes.label: Glob Tool
nodes.description: PermissionTier.LOW; file pattern matching

nodes.label: Grep Tool
nodes.description: PermissionTier.LOW; ripgrep preferred; falls back to grep; shutil.which('rg') cached

nodes.label: _file_state.py
nodes.description: mtime-based Write safety: record_read(), check_write(), invalidate()

nodes.label: Task State Machine
nodes.description: CREATED→PLANNING→RUNNING→COMPLETED/FAILED/CANCELLED

nodes.label: ConversationView
nodes.description: React Native shared component in src/components/conversation/; renders messages with streaming support

nodes.label: Zustand Session Store
nodes.description: Per-session state: SessionState with messages, streamingTurns, status, lastEventSeq

nodes.description: Sets session to WAITING; publishes SESSION_WAITING event; allows sub-agent to pause for parent input

nodes.description: _on_event routes by event.data.get('parent_session_id') to parent subscribers
